title: Polarized Z2 + VO2max
description: Polarized model — low and high, nothing in between
purpose: Polarized model — low and high, nothing in between

intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/5. 75% FTP, Seated. 10:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 75% for 10:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into session. 75%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Zone 2. 20:00 at 68%. Boring? Maybe. Effective? Absolutely.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Steady state endurance. 68% FTP, 90-95 rpm. Sustainable for hours.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 66 minutes to go. Consistency over intensity. You're doing the work that matters.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Zone 2: where excitement goes to retire. 20:00 of controlled boredom.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay patient. Stay easy. 68% for 20:00. Trust the process.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is harder than the last one. That's the point. Rep 2/7.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 2/7. Duration: 4:00. Power target unchanged, but cumulative stress is building.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 2/7. You're building something real here. 5 more opportunities to get stronger.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Set 1/5. The suffering is progressive, like a tax bracket.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Set 1/5. 115%, 90-95 rpm. This is where your aerobic ceiling gets raised.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 4:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/5. 55% FTP, Seated. 4:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 3/7. You're 39% done. This is where average athletes quit. You're not average.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 39% through session. Rep 3/7. You've done 24min of VO2 work. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 3/7. You're not breaking — you're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 3/7. Fun fact: this is the exact power output where regret lives.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Starting. 115% for 4:00. Controlled aggression. Lock in form early.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 4:00 at 55%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1/1. 45-55% FTP, 85-95 rpm, Seated. Execute with precision.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 42 minutes of work done. 50 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 4:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 4:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 47% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 4:00 at 115%. Then 4:00 rest. Pace yourself for repeatability.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 47% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 47% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 47% done. 115% for 4:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. 55%, 85-95 rpm. This is how.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 32min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 55% for 4:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 55% for 4:00. Then 42min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 52% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 56% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: This one: 115% for 4:00. Next up: 4:00 recovery, then 4min at 115%.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 56% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 56% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 56% done. 115% for 4:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 60% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 60% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 58 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 34 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 6/7. You're 64% done. This is where average athletes quit. You're not average.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 64% through session. Rep 6/7. You've done 36min of VO2 work. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 62 minutes of work done. 30 to go. You're right where you need to be.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 64% done. The good news: almost finished. The bad news: 1 intervals left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 1 intervals left. 30 total minutes. Your lungs are burning. That's adaptation.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 68% for 20:00. Easy miles make fast racing. Stop overthinking.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 68% through. Low intensity, high volume. Building the engine from ground up.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 68% done. 10 minutes left. Not every workout needs to hurt. This is smart training.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 68% done. 10 minutes left. This feels like cheating. It's not. It's science. Probably.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Easy spin. 68% for 20:00. 90-100 rpm, Seated. Relax and breathe.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 86 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 89% complete. Rep 1/1. 60% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 86 minutes of work done. 0 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 89% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: 89% into session. 60%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.
